title: Your best practices are trapped in your head, and your AI has no idea
key_points: Argues that the 'taste' designers build over years, tone of voice, component principles, definitions of 'done', currently lives invisibly in people's heads, scattered docs, or places their tools can't access.
Frames a core problem with AI workflows: every AI session starts from scratch because this accumulated context is invisible, forcing designers to repeat themselves each time.
Proposes building a shared knowledge layer that connects these scattered sources so AI can draw on a team's established context.
Shows how that shared context lets AI meaningfully assist with specs, prototypes, and design systems without constant re-explanation.
